reference: You should see your doctor immediately for further evaluation. You may be experiencing a reactivation of your previous tuberculomas and may require another round of treatment. You should not delay, even if the headaches improve, especially if you are inclined to take over-the-counter analgesics, as they may alleviate the headaches but will not address the bacillus infection if it has reactivated. Good luck. I would appreciate your best star rating if I have provided you with useful information.
text: You should see your doctor immediately for further evaluation. You may be experiencing a reactivation of your previous tuberculomas and may require another round of treatment. You should not delay, even if the headaches improve, especially if you are inclined to take over-the-counter analgesics, as they may alleviate the headaches but will not address the bacillus infection if it has reactivated. Good luck. I would appreciate your best star rating if I have provided you with useful info.
